name: ToolOracle
description: EU regulatory compliance APIs for AI agents — 11 paid endpoints on Base mainnet covering MiCA, DORA, AMLR, and sanctions screening. Real-time agent action validation (UVO), stablecoin compliance checks, sanctions screening (87k+ entities), DORA ICT risk, and phantom-citation detection for EU legal texts. Operated by FeedOracle Technologies (Germany 🇩🇪).
